Welcome to our  
Press Section
Our press area offers the most recent updates, relevant details about our company, and contact information for your direct point of contact.
### Press contacts
**Andreas Grafemeyer  
** Public Relations The Trailblazers  
Phone: +49 170 9150679  
Email: andreas@thetrailblazers.de
**Anja Bräuning  
** Lead Corporate Communications & Marketing  
Telefon: +49 163 807 06 09  
E-Mail: anja.braeuning@eleqtron.com 
Our goal: To make computing time on quantum computers available to companies, institutions and science.
eleQtron develops and operates quantum computers. Our machines will be capable of solving problems that even the world’s most powerful conventional supercomputers cannot tackle. To do this, we harness the quantum states of ions – controlled not by lasers, but by established and miniaturized radio-frequency technology. A unique concept we call MAGIC (Magnetic Gradient Induced Coupling).
## News Coverage
Collection of relevant media reports about our company from trade press, newspapers and online media. Compact overview of previous coverage on our quantum technologies.

[ Download Bio ](https://eleqtron.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/michael-johanning-en.pdf)
##  Quantum – a new era for humanity
Our unique selling point: the company’s proprietary, patented, and scalable MAGIC technology. Unlike other approaches, our ion qubits are manipulated using radio-frequency waves – not lasers.
The potential of quantum computing is immense: from material science, logistics, and supply chain management in industry, to personalized pharmaceuticals, big data, and risk management in the financial sector. Numerous investors and supporters believe in this potential – including the German Federal Ministry of Education and Research (BMBF) and venture capital investor Earlybird.
